name: tu-agent
description: Project knowledge + setup on your Claude subscription: /tu-agent:prepare sets up a repo (CLAUDE.md knowledge block, hardened settings.json); /tu-agent:learn builds a per-domain concept index in the graph store; /tu-agent:synthesize builds the architecture overview; /tu-agent:status reports staleness. Bundles a graph MCP server (tu-agent-graph) exposing get_impact/get_context/find_symbol/get_concept over the project's dependency graph. Deterministic analysis (scanning, clustering, graph) runs in the tu-agent binary; all generation runs in Claude Code.
